nasb.text: Then the men did so, and took two milch cows and hitched them to the cart, and shut up their calves at home.

esv.text: The men did so, and took two milk cows and yoked them to the cart and shut up their calves at home.

cnv.text: 非利士人就照著去行。他們牽來兩頭還在乳養小牛的母牛，把牠們緊緊套在車上，把小牛關在棚裡。

ccb.text: 于是，非利士人一一照做，他们牵来两头还在哺养小牛的母牛，把它们套在车上，把小牛关在圈里，
